The '''Book of the Boolmide''' was the holy book of the [[Skakoan religion]]. It was kept by the [[Elders (Skakoan)|Elders]], who read it on the [[Power Mounds of the Elders]]. In certain situations, such a reading could open the [[Gates of Grontessiant]].

==Appearances==
*{{StoryCite|story=Wat Tambor and the Quest for the Sacred Eye of the Albino Cyclops|book=Star Wars: Visionaries}}
